title: Creator content has become critical for retail media networks
description: Execs in the advertising businesses of retailers like Walmart, Best Buy and Albertsons see value in incorporating more creator-led content.

title: Salesforce shares approach toward integration with OpenAI’s ChatGPT
description:
Ecommerce technology provider Salesforce has been piloting a program in which it offers its merchants an integration with OpenAI’s ChatGPT. This is part of a growing trend among retailers and technology providers to join more artificial intelligence (AI)-powered platforms as additional channels to make sales. Gordon Evans, chief marketing officer of Salesforce’s Commerce Cloud, shared […]
The post Salesforce shares approach toward integration with OpenAI’s ChatGPT appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Archer teams with ‘Mandalorian and Grogu’ for first entertainment deal
description: As the meat snacks marketer expands, it is collaborating with the “Star Wars” universe for a campaign spanning retail, digital, social and out-of-home.

title: Why brands can’t stop acting like reply guys and jumping into viral comment threads on social media
description: Brands are jumping into viral comment threads on TikTok, Instagram and X to generate real-time engagement. Not only is this an effective tactic to gain more likes and followers, but it can also help strike creator partnerships on the fly.

title: AG1 lands in Target as its year of retail expansion continues
description: AG1's year of retail expansion continues. Months after launching in Costco and The Vitamin Shoppe, AG1 is announcing today that it is entering Target.

title: On, Zendaya launch first co-created collection
description: The collection — which features tank tops, T-shirts, jackets, pants and more — comes to life through a marketing campaign directed by Spike Jonze.

title: Stanley 1913’s approach to product development through diversity
description: Executive Graham Nearn spoke to Retail Dive about how Stanley is expanding its offerings as it grows into a global brand.

title: Nike’s innovation chief departs as leadership turnover continues
description: Turnarounds rely on innovation cycles, and the abrupt departure of Tony Bignell could be another sign that the retail giant isn’t out of the woods, one analyst said.

title: TD SYNNEX Q1 revenue surpasses expectations
description:
TD SYNNEX reported record revenue in its fiscal Q1 2026, propelled by continued demand and successful artificial intelligence (AI) integration. The IT distributor said revenue reached $17.2 billion in the quarter ended Feb. 28, an 18% increase over the same period in the previous year. That result significantly outpaced projects, the company said. Net income […]
The post TD SYNNEX Q1 revenue surpasses expectations appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Chipotle overhauls rewards system
description: More free items and an in-store campaign to boost enrollment could help the fast casual giant expand its already considerable rewards base.

title: AI search adoption splits along income lines
description:
Higher-value audiences are adopting AI faster, fragmenting search behavior and reshaping decisions before the click.
The post AI search adoption splits along income lines appeared first on MarTech.

title: A framework for auditing generative AI outputs pre-launch
description:
A structured review process helps teams enforce brand voice and reduce legal risk before AI-generated content reaches market.
The post A framework for auditing generative AI outputs pre-launch appeared first on MarTech.

title: An Amazon warehouse worker died on the job at Oregon facility
description: Though Amazon has faced issues with warehouse safety, the company said that the death was not work related.

title: Publicis Groupe Grows for 20th Straight Quarter, But Momentum Slows
description: Conflict in the Middle East weighed on the Group’s revenue growth.

title: JCPenney Brings Its Battle Against Fashion Elitism to Women’s Basketball
description: JCPenney breaks into women's sports with Inside Lane, an extension of its message that great style doesn't have to cost a fortune.
